message:
Fix 18 bugs in implementation plan from round 1 review

Critical fixes:
- Add missing imports (GLib in scaleManager, Clutter in inputRouter)
- Remove Meta from constants.js (use raw integers for portability)
- Fix imports.system.exit -> System.exit for ES modules
- Fix assertFalse missing from test imports
- Fix Extension.getSettings() path -> Gio.Settings with schema_id+path
- Fix container-after-destroy ordering (destroyClone now self-removes)
- Fix grab-op-begin signature for GNOME 50 (2-param callback)

Logic fixes:
- Remove dead GSettings enum definitions (keep type="s")
- Fix Date.now() probe race (store ID in variable)
- Cache placer instances (ShelfPlacer was re-created per call)
- Implement hysteresis in _handleFocus (was dead code)
- Fix stamp drag handler leaks (store+disconnect signal IDs)
- Remove dual click handler conflict (click only in extension.js)
- Fix _onDropStamp geometry (preserve real window dimensions)
- Fix _restoreWindow to move_resize_frame for prev cells
- Guard against double-connecting per-window signals
- Fix idle polling spin (use timeout + retry limit)
- Fix prefs.js signal handler leak on monitor switch
- Add missing exempt apps UI to prefs
- Add TDD notes for shell-dependent modules

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
